summary: Completed testing for member deduplication logic and KPI card overflow fix. All 15 backend deduplication tests passed (1 skipped for non-existent health endpoint). Frontend UI verified all tab counts correct (Actifs=59, Coachs=29, Expirés=5, Partis=226, Tous=98). Camille Astier correctly excluded from Actifs tab with is_coach_also flag and appears in Coachs tab with THE COACH membership. Compare page KPI cards display values without overflow.
critical_code_review_comments: Deduplication logic in members.py correctly identifies dual subscriptions (HUBFIT + COACH) and flags with is_coach_also
True duplicates (same name + membership) correctly flagged with is_duplicate
MetricCard component in ComparePage.js uses text-base, truncate, min-w-0 to prevent overflow
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 48 tested member deduplication. Backend API /api/members/stats returns: active_members=59, active_coaches=29, expired=5, departed=226. GET /api/members returns is_coach_also=true for 5 HUBFIT records of dual-subscription members (Camille Astier, Johan Michelazzi, Lucas Da Costa, Léa Ebebeden, Taha Bentafat). is_duplicate=true for Nicholas Schmale HUBFIT and Salomé DUO duplicates. Frontend MembersPage correctly filters is_coach_also from Actifs tab. ComparePage MetricCard uses text-base truncate min-w-0 for overflow prevention.
